meta.summary: QUAST evaluates genome and metagenome assemblies with reference-aware metrics, no-reference summaries, MetaQUAST, QUAST-LG, and Icarus reports.
meta.description: QUAST evaluates genome and metagenome assemblies with reference-aware metrics, no-reference summaries, MetaQUAST, QUAST-LG, and Icarus reports.

test: metaquast.py --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'QUAST v5.3.0, c3eb988a (MetaQUAST mode)' >/dev/null && quast-lg.py --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'QUAST v5.3.0, c3eb988a (QUAST-LG mode)' >/dev/null && icarus.py --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'QUAST v5.3.0, c3eb988a' >/dev/null

quast.py --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Quality Assessment Tool for Genome Assemblies' >/dev/null && metaquast.py --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Quality Assessment Tool for Metagenome Assemblies' >/dev/null && quast-lg.py --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Quality Assessment Tool for Large Genome Assemblies' >/dev/null

test -x /opt/quast/quast_libs/minimap2/minimap2 && /opt/quast/quast_libs/minimap2/minimap2 --version 2>&1 | grep -Fx '2.28-r1209' >/dev/null && /opt/quast/quast_libs/bwa/bwa 2>&1 | grep -F 'Program: bwa' >/dev/null && /opt/quast/quast_libs/bedtools/bin/bedtools --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'bedtools' >/dev/null && test -x /opt/quast/quast_libs/glimmer/glimmerhmm && test -x /opt/quast/quast_libs/barrnap/bin/barrnap && test -x /opt/quast/quast_libs/sambamba/sambamba_linux

rm -rf /tmp/taf-quast-smoke && mkdir -p /tmp/taf-quast-smoke && quast.py --no-html --no-plots --no-icarus -t 1 -r /opt/quast/test_data/reference.fasta.gz -o /tmp/taf-quast-smoke/out /opt/quast/test_data/contigs_1.fasta >/tmp/taf-quast-smoke.log 2>&1 && test -s /tmp/taf-quast-smoke/out/report.txt && test -s /tmp/taf-quast-smoke/out/report.tsv && grep -F '# contigs' /tmp/taf-quast-smoke/out/report.tsv >/dev/null && grep -F 'Genome fraction (%)' /tmp/taf-quast-smoke/out/report.tsv >/dev/null

upstream.name: QUAST
upstream.citation: Gurevich et al. 2013; Mikheenko et al. 2018; Mikheenko et al. 2023
